theme_category: 社会-网络治理与公共安全

gold.rationale: 关于“网传坍塌视频为AI生成、重庆近期未发生立交桥坍塌且警方介入调查”的核心结论与辟谣信息一致；但文本将传播语境包装为“节后返程高峰期间”等更具即时性的时间框架，易让受众误以为事件发生在当下特定节点，属于语境时间上的误导性呈现。

atomic_points.post_summary: 节后返程高峰期间，网络平台流传一段涉及“重庆立交桥坍塌”的视频，重庆有关部门已启动处置流程并澄清未发生此类事故。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 节后返程高峰期间，网络平台流传一段涉及“重庆立交桥坍塌”的视频，引发关注。

视频内容涉及重庆立交桥坍塌。
该视频引发关注。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 重庆有关部门随即启动网络信息处置流程，对相关传播链条开展排查。
atoms: 重庆有关部门启动网络信息处置流程。
相关部门对相关传播链条开展排查。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 据重庆市应急管理部门及南岸区相关部门统一对外口径，重庆南岸区近期未发生立交桥坍塌事故。

重庆南岸区近期未发生立交桥坍塌事故。

quoted_text_and_attributions.quoted_text: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法

atoms: A collapsed concrete highway overpass section lies in a pile of rubble on the ground.
Multiple red fire trucks and white ambulances are parked on the left side of the road.
Rescue workers wearing orange high-visibility vests are standing on the debris and the remaining bridge structure.
Police officers in blue uniforms are standing behind yellow and black striped barricades.
A blue banner with white Chinese text is held up in the foreground.
A green highway sign in the background reads '重庆 南岸立交' (Chongqing Nan'an Interchange).
Heavy traffic is visible on the elevated highway in the background.
Dust and debris are rising from the collapsed structure.
A woman in a white blazer stands at a podium speaking into microphones.
A large blue banner behind the speaker contains white Chinese text.
A crowd of journalists and photographers surrounds the podium holding cameras and phones.
The background shows a multi-level highway interchange with active traffic.
The podium has a sign reading '重庆市人民政府新闻发布会' (Chongqing Municipal People's Government Press Conference).
The banner text includes '辟谣：重庆南岸立交结构完好' (Debunking: Chongqing Nan'an Interchange structure is intact).
The banner text includes '严厉打击谣言' (Crack down on rumors).
Mountains and high-rise buildings are visible in the distance.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A disaster scene showing a collapsed concrete highway overpass with rubble scattered on the ground. Emergency vehicles, including red fire trucks and white ambulances, are present on the left. Rescue workers in orange vests and police in blue uniforms are managing the scene behind barricades. A blue banner with Chinese text is visible in the foreground.

visible_overlays_annotations: Blue banner with white text: '重庆“南岸立交”坍塌事故救援现场'
Green highway sign: '重庆 南岸立交'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts a collapsed bridge, which visually contradicts the post text stating that the bridge structure is intact and the video is AI-generated misinformation.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A press conference taking place outdoors with a woman speaking at a podium. A large blue banner behind her explicitly states that the Chongqing Nan'an Interchange structure is intact and that rumors are being debunked. Journalists and cameras surround the speaker. The background shows a functioning highway interchange.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 重庆市人民政府新闻发布会 | 辟谣：重庆南岸立交结构完好 (Debunking: Chongqing Nan'an Interchange structure is intact) | 交通正常 (Traffic is normal) | 网络安全 (Cybersecurity) | 严厉打击谣言 (Crack down on rumors)

Podium sign: '重庆市人民政府新闻发布会'
Text on banner: '严厉打击谣言' (Crack down on rumors)
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows an official press conference explicitly denying the collapse and debunking rumors, which aligns with the post text stating that the bridge is intact and the video is false.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post claims this image depicts a collapsed bridge in Chongqing, specifically the Nan'an Interchange, and that it was AI-generated.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A massive concrete overpass collapse with emergency responders, fire trucks, and debris on a highway interchange.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: DISAGREE - The image shows a real-world disaster scene with physical debris and emergency vehicles, contradicting the claim that it is AI-generated.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post claims this image depicts the same collapsed bridge scene and serves as a backdrop for a press conference denying the collapse.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A press conference with a female spokesperson speaking to reporters, with a banner behind her stating 'Chongqing Government Press Conference' and 'Nan'an Interchange structure is intact'.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: Banner text: '辟谣：重庆南岸区“南岸立交”结构完好（新闻发布会）' (Debunking: Chongqing Nan'an District 'Nan'an Interchange' structure is intact (Press Conference))
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE_PARTIALLY - The image visually supports the post's narrative of a collapse event occurring (the background bridge looks damaged) while simultaneously providing the official denial mentioned in the text.

retrieved_evidence.text: 重庆南岸区的立交桥群近年来在城市交通体系中发挥重要枢纽作用，相关设施多为多层互通式结构，承担着主城区机动车通行和分流功能。近日有网络内容以“南岸立交坍塌”为题流传，引发社会关注。根据重庆市相关部门和应急管理机构介绍，近期全市立交桥未发生坍塌事故，南岸区域道路交通运行总体平稳，桥梁日常巡检和结构监测工作仍由市政及养护单位按既定制度执行。
重庆市南岸区有关部门近日表示，近期该区未接报立交桥坍塌等较大道路交通基础设施事故，城市桥梁运行总体平稳。据南岸区城市管理及交通等部门介绍，辖区内主干道路和立交桥梁日常巡查和检测工作按计划开展，尚未发现严重结构性风险情况。相关部门同时指出，社会上关于“立交桥坍塌”的各类说法应以官方通报为准，若市民发现道路设施存在安全隐患，可通过热线或线上渠道及时反馈，以便尽快核查和处置。
关于网传“南岸立交坍塌”的动态内容，网络平台上出现了以道路断裂、桥体扭曲和车辆受阻等场景为素材的短片和截取片段，部分用户据此联想为重庆真实事故。有关网络监管和公安机关表示，已对相关传播账号、技术手段和内容来源开展核查，并会同南岸区政府和市级部门加强舆情研判，提醒公众通过官方渠道获取重庆公共安全信息，避免因夸大性网络内容产生恐慌。
近日，一段与“重庆立交桥坍塌”相关的视频在部分网络平台上流传，引发网民围观和讨论。据平台方面介绍，该视频发布后在短时间内获得大量点击和转发，一些用户在评论区就具体地点、时间及可能原因展开猜测。多名受访信息安全领域人士表示，类似涉及城市基础设施和公共安全的内容，一旦传播范围扩大，容易引起社会情绪波动，呼吁公众在转发相关画面前保持审慎，关注权威渠道发布的后续信息。

【重庆“南岸立交”发生坍塌系AI生成】近日，有网民在互联网平台发布视频，显示重庆市“南岸立交”发生坍塌事故，引发关注。经重庆市应急管理局及南岸区相关部门核实，重庆市南岸区并无名为“南岸立交”的立交桥，近期重庆也未发生立交桥坍塌事故，网传信息系谣言。该视频作者虽然声明了“内容系AI生成”，但其传播的虚假不实内容仍然引发部分网友误解误读，如在评论区跟帖称“看到路牌是重庆的”“重庆市立交桥坍塌了一段”。按照《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》规定，使用生成式人工智能服务，应当遵守法律、行政法规，尊重社会公德和伦理道德，不得生成虚假有害信息。目前，警方正对造谣网民展开调查。（来源：“重庆辟谣”微信公众号）
针对近日在网上流传的“重庆立交桥坍塌”相关视频，网传发布者在说明栏中标注该内容系利用技术手段生成的模拟画面。有关网络平台人士介绍，尽管有标注提示，仍有部分网民在未充分阅读说明的情况下，将其当作真实事故画面理解并在多个群组和社交页面转发，引发一定范围的误读和争议。多名受访新媒体从业人员指出，技术生成的视频在视觉上具有较强逼真度，提醒用户在浏览此类内容时注意查看来源说明，避免简单以画面外观作判断。

记者近日从有关部门获悉，针对网络上出现的“重庆立交桥坍塌”相关视频等情况，监管机构在处置过程中参照了《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》中关于内容管理的有关规定。据了解，该办法对相关服务在提供技术生成内容时提出要求，包括不得生成、传播虚假有害信息，以及对技术生成内容作出必要标识提示等。多名政策研究人士表示，在此类规定框架下，平台和服务提供者在审核、标注及处置相关信息方面的责任进一步被明确，具体执行细节仍在实践中不断完善。
据重庆市相关部门近日通报，针对网上传播的“重庆立交桥坍塌”相关视频及其扩散情况，依法依规的调查和处置工作已启动。警方人士介绍，当前正会同网信等部门，对内容制作、发布账号信息及传播路径进行梳理核查，重点了解相关行为是否存在扰乱网络秩序等情形。有关部门表示，后续将根据调查结果，依照现行法律法规分类采取教育、约谈或其他处置措施，并适时对外公布阶段性进展，提醒公众理性参与网络讨论。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the event and official response but contains a specific factual error regarding the existence of the 'Nan'an Interchange' in the video description, which the evidence explicitly refutes.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post claims the video shows 'Nan'an Interchange' location information (Sentence 4), but Evidence [3] explicitly states there is no such interchange in Chongqing and the video is AI-generated, while Evidence [1] confirms no such infrastructure exists in the area.
t3_problematic_subclaims: Claim that video shows 'Nan'an Interchange' location information
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text implies the video depicts a real 'Nan'an Interchange' collapse scene (Sentence 4), whereas Image 1 description shows a collapsed overpass with rescue vehicles and OCR text claiming 'Chongqing Nan'an Interchange collapse accident rescue scene', creating a semantic mismatch with the evidence that this location does not exist and the content is AI-generated.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Text implies video shows real 'Nan'an Interchange' collapse scene; Image 1 depicts a disaster scene with OCR claiming collapse rescue, contradicting evidence that the location does not exist.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate in reporting the debunking of the rumor and the official response, but it fails to correct the false premise that the video actually depicts the non-existent 'Nan'an Interchange', constituting a misleading context error.

judge.level3_rationale: 虽然文本准确报告了官方辟谣及调查进程，但图片中展示的事故发生地坍塌场景经核实确系人工智能生成的合成内容，属于视觉层面的虚构；依据评估规则，合成视觉素材的存在将降低样本的整体可信度，因此不能认定为全真或部分真实，最终归类为大部分虚假。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post is mostly true because the core claim (rumor debunked, video is AI) is supported, but the specific location claim ('Nan'an Interchange') is factually incorrect as the interchange does not exist, creating a misleading context (T3). The images are authentic and correctly support the narrative.
judge.core_claim: The post claims that a video circulating online depicts a collapse of the 'Nan'an Interchange' in Chongqing, which is an AI-generated fabrication that has caused public confusion, and that official authorities have debunked the collapse as false.
key_subclaims: The video circulating online depicts a collapse of the 'Nan'an Interchange' in Chongqing.
The video caused public confusion and misreading.
Chongqing Nan'an Interchange does not exist or has not collapsed.
Authorities have launched an investigation and debunked the collapse rumor.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The video circulating online depicts a collapse of the 'Nan'an Interchange' in Chongqing.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [5] explicitly state there is no 'Nan'an Interchange' in Chongqing and the collapse is a fabrication.
Evidence [5] confirms the video author labeled it as AI-generated and it was verified as such.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The video caused public confusion and misreading.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [5] and [6] confirm the video caused misunderstanding despite the AI label.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Chongqing Nan'an Interchange does not exist or has not collapsed.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [5] confirm no such interchange exists and no collapse occurred.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Authorities have launched an investigation and debunked the collapse rumor.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [5] and [8] confirm police and emergency departments investigated and debunked the rumor.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post accurately reports the official debunking of the rumor and the AI nature of the video, but it misleadingly frames the video as depicting a 'Nan'an Interchange' collapse, implying the location exists or the event is a real accident. The evidence confirms the interchange does not exist, making the specific location claim a contextual error (T3). The images provided are real photos of the press conference and the disaster scene, correctly illustrating the post's narrative of 'debunking' and 'the fake video', so no visual fabrication (V1/V2) or semantic mismatch (C1) is present. The single T3 label indicates a misleading context but does not change the core truth of the post.

image_findings.explanation: The image depicts a real disaster scene with a collapsed bridge, rescue vehicles, and a banner explicitly stating 'Chongqing Nan'an Interchange Collapse Rescue Scene', which aligns with the post's description of the video content and the evidence that the video is a realistic simulation of this specific event.

The image shows a press conference with a banner explicitly debunking the 'Nan'an Interchange collapse' and stating the structure is intact, which perfectly matches the post's claim that authorities have clarified the situation and the video is false.
